whyCandidateMatters: Mosque of al-Lu’lu’a would broaden the project beyond the current 41-record set and improve district, type, or period coverage. Coverage value: this record would expand the Fatimid layer in Moqattam through a mosque/shrine rather than duplicating an existing published monument.
knownResearchGaps: Confirm a direct monument-specific institutional or academic source.
